title: Sing Hallelujah! Praise the LORD!

verses.text: With sounding cymbals praise the LORD! With clashing cymbals praise aloud! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Let all that breathes now praise the LORD! O praise the LORD forevermore! O praise him! O praise him! Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
